title: mapania neblina
intro: Mapania neblina, also known as the "Cloud-soft sedge" or "Cloud fern", is a species of sedge that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. It is native to the tropical forests of South America and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including the treatment of respiratory issues, fever reduction, and wound healing, as well as potential anti-cancer properties. Mapania neblina is typically prepared as a tea, infusion, or decoction, and can also be used as a poultice or topical cream for external applications.
